summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Password Flow features for CRM Fakulti. All 16 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: 2. POST /api/auth/change-password validates strong password (8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char) and clears must_change_password flag
3. POST /api/auth/generate-provisional-password generates secure password and sets must_change_password=true
4. Developer can generate provisional password for admin, admin can generate for advisor (role hierarchy enforced)
5. Creating a new advisor sets must_change_password: true
6. ForceChangePasswordModal appears on login when must_change_password is true and blocks navigation
7. Login page shows contact messages (Administradores contacta al Desarrollador, Asesores contacta al Administrador)
8. Password strength validation with visual feedback (Débil/Media/Fuerte) and requirement checklist
9. DevAlertsPage shows pending password reset requests with generate provisional button
10. AdvisorsPage shows reset section with password generator and strength bar

admin.note: Password changed to meet strong password requirements

advisor.note: Password changed to meet strong password requirements

seed_data_creation: Test advisor created and deleted during testing. Admin and advisor passwords were reset to strong passwords (Admin123!, Advisor123!) to meet the new password requirements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password flow fully tested. Key verified features: 1) Login returns must_change_password flag, 2) ForceChangePasswordModal blocks navigation when must_change_password=true, 3) Password strength validation (8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char), 4) Developer generates provisional for admin, admin generates for advisor, 5) New advisors have must_change_password=true, 6) DevAlertsPage shows pending requests with generate button, 7) AdvisorsPage shows reset section with password generator. IMPORTANT: Admin password is now Admin123! and advisor password is Advisor123! (both meet strong password requirements).

login_must_change_password.developer_login: PASS - Developer login also returns must_change_password

password_strength_validation.no_special: PASS - Password without special char rejected

generate_provisional_password.developer_for_admin: PASS - Developer can generate for admin
generate_provisional_password.admin_for_advisor: PASS - Admin can generate for advisor
generate_provisional_password.admin_cannot_for_admin: PASS - Admin cannot generate for admin (403)

password_reset_requests.admin_message: PASS - Admin forgot password shows developer contact message
password_reset_requests.advisor_message: PASS - Advisor forgot password shows admin contact message

frontend_login_page.contact_messages: PASS - Shows 'Administradores contacta al Desarrollador' and 'Asesores contacta al Administrador'

force_change_password_modal.password_generator: PASS - Generate secure password button works
force_change_password_modal.strength_bar: PASS - Shows Débil/Media/Fuerte based on password strength
force_change_password_modal.submit_clears_flag: PASS - Modal closes after password change

dev_alerts_page.pending_requests: PASS - Shows pending password reset requests
dev_alerts_page.generate_button: PASS - Generate provisional password button visible

advisors_page.advisor_cards: PASS - Shows advisor cards with Reset button
advisors_page.password_generator: PASS - Password generator and strength bar in reset section
